mapper.select: SELECT #{ses.companyCd} AS BUYER_CD , GETCUSTNAME(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.companyCd}) AS BUYER_REQ_NM , #{ses.plantCd} AS PLANT_CD , (SYSDATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS REQ_DATE , #{ses.userNm} AS REQ_USER_NM , #{ses.userId} AS REQ_USER_ID , GETDEPTNAME(#{ses.gateCd}, #{ses.companyCd}, (SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND USER_ID = #{ses.userId} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'), #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_USER_DEPT , #{ses.telNum} AS TEL_NUM

SELECT PR_NUM
, TO_CHAR(PR_SQ) AS PR_SQ , TO_CHAR(PR_SUB_SQ) AS PR_SUB_SQ
, CAST(PR_SQ AS VARCHAR(6)) AS PR_SQ , CAST(PR_SUB_SQ AS VARCHAR(6)) AS PR_SUB_SQ
, SUB_TEXT , SUB_ITEM_TEXT , UNIT_PRC , SUB_RMK , SUB_ITEM_DESC , SUB_ITEM_SPEC FROM STOCPRSI WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND PR_NUM = #{PR_NUM} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND PR_SQ = #{PR_SQ}
ORDER BY PR_SQ

SELECT PRHD.PR_NUM , PRHD.SUBJECT , getCustName(PRHD.GATE_CD, PRHD.BUYER_CD) ||' '|| getDeptName(PRHD.GATE_CD, PRHD.BUYER_CD, PRHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) BUYER_NM , PRHD.CUR , PRHD.SIGN_STATUS , GETCODENAME(#{ses.gateCd}, 'M020', PRHD.SIGN_STATUS, #{ses.langCd}) as SIGN_STATUS_NM , PRHD.PR_AMT PR_AMT_SUM ,(SELECT ITEM_DESC FROM STOCPRDT WHERE GATE_CD = PRHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = PRHD.BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = PRHD.PR_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1)
(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCPRDT WHERE GATE_CD = PRHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = PRHD.BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = PRHD.PR_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') > 1 THEN ' 외 '
((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCPRDT WHERE GATE_CD = PRHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = PRHD.BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = PRHD.PR_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') - 1) || ' 건' END) AS SUB_ITEM_CNT ,(PRHD.REQ_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS REQ_DATE , GETUSERNAME(PRHD.GATE_CD, PRHD.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_USER_NM , PRHD.BUYER_CD , PRHD.REG_USER_ID , PRHD.IF_TYPE ,(PRHD.PR_TYPE, '10') AS PR_TYPE ,(SELECT MAX(PRE_BUYER_CD) FROM STOCPRDT WHERE GATE_CD = PRHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = PRHD.BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = PRHD.PR_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PRE_BUYER_CD ,(SELECT MAX(PRE_CONT_NUM) FROM STOCPRDT WHERE GATE_CD = PRHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = PRHD.BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = PRHD.PR_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PRE_CONT_NUM ,(SELECT MAX(PRE_CONT_CNT) FROM STOCPRDT WHERE GATE_CD = PRHD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = PRHD.BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = PRHD.PR_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PRE_CONT_CNT , PRHD.CM_REQ_ID FROM STOCPRHD PRHD WHERE PRHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND PRHD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND PRHD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND PRHD.REQ_DATE >= (#{REQ_DATE_FROM}) AND PRHD.REQ_DATE <= (#{REQ_DATE_TO})
AND UPPER( PRHD.PR_NUM ) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(PRHD.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{PR_SUBJECT}, ' ', '')) '%'
AND PRHD.SIGN_STATUS = #{SIGN_STATUS}
AND PRHD.REQ_USER_ID = #{REQ_USER_ID}
AND GETUSERNAME(PRHD.GATE_CD, PRHD.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{REQ_USER_NM}) '%'
AND PRHD.CM_REQ_ID LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CM_REQ_ID}) '%'
ORDER BY PRHD.REQ_DATE DESC , PRHD.PR_NUM DESC

SELECT RIQD.UNIT_CD, RIQD.ITEM_SPEC, RIQD.ITEM_RMK, RIQD.ITEM_DESC, RIQD.ITEM_CD, RIAD_SUB.RFI_UNIT_PRC FROM STOCRIQD RIQD JOIN (SELECT RIAD.RFI_NUM, RIAD.RFI_SQ, RIAD.UNIT_PRC AS RFI_UNIT_PRC, RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY RIAD.RFI_NUM, RIAD.RFI_SQ, RIAH.VENDOR_CD ORDER BY SUM(RIAD.RFI_AMT)) AS RANK, SUM(RIAD.RFI_AMT) AS RFI_AMT FROM STOCRIAD RIAD JOIN STOCRIAH RIAH ON(RIAD.GATE_CD = RIAH.GATE_CD AND RIAD.RFI_NUM = RIAH.RFI_NUM AND RIAD.ANSWER_SQ = RIAH.ANSWER_SQ) WHERE RIAD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RIAD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND RIAH.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND RIAH.RECOMMEND_FLAG = '1' GROUP BY RIAD.RFI_NUM, RIAD.RFI_SQ, RIAH.VENDOR_CD, RIAD.UNIT_PRC ) RIAD_SUB ON( RIQD.RFI_NUM = RIAD_SUB.RFI_NUM AND RIQD.RFI_SQ = RIAD_SUB.RFI_SQ ) WHERE RIQD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RIQD.RFI_NUM = #{rfiNo} AND RIQD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND RIAD_SUB.RANK = 1

SELECT BAMT.CTRL_CD , BACP.CTRL_USER_ID , BACO.PUR_ORG_CD FROM STOCOGCM OGCM LEFT JOIN STOCBACP BACP ON (OGCM.GATE_CD = BACP.GATE_CD AND OGCM.REAL_BUYER_CD = BACP.BUYER_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCBACO BACO ON (BACP.GATE_CD = BACO.GATE_CD AND BACP.CTRL_CD = BACO.CTRL_CD AND BACP.BUYER_CD = BACO.BUYER_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCBAMT BAMT ON (BACO.CTRL_CD = BAMT.CTRL_CD AND BACO.BUYER_CD = BAMT.BUYER_CD AND BACO.GATE_CD = BAMT.GATE_CD) LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCMTGC MTGC ON (BAMT.GATE_CD = MTGC.GATE_CD AND MTGC.BUYER_CD = BAMT.BUYER_CD AND MTGC.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND MTGC.M_CATE_YN='1') WHERE BAMT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND OGCM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND BACP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND BACO.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND BAMT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND OGCM.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_REQ_CD} AND MTGC.ITEM_CD = #{ITEM_CD} AND BAMT.CTRL_CD = BACO.CTRL_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCPRHB ( GATE_CD , PR_NUM , PR_SQ , REG_DATE ) SELECT GATE_CD , PR_NUM , PR_SQ , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE FROM STOCPRDT WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND PR_NUM = #{PR_NUM} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

INSERT INTO STOCDONU( GATE_CD , DOC_SQ , PR_NUM , PR_SQ , PB_BUYER_CD ) SELECT GATE_CD , SEQ_STOCDONU.NEXTVAL , PR_NUM , PR_SQ , BUYER_CD AS PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCPRDT WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND PR_NUM = #{PR_NUM} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT ACCOUNT_NUM , ACCOUNT_NM FROM STOCACMT WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ACCOUNT_NUM = #{ACCOUNT_NUM} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY ACCOUNT_NUM ASC
